source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Researchers in the Southwest are studying tortoises-a species of animal that is affected by habitat loss due to human development of the desert. A total of 78 tortoises are being studied by researchers at several sites. The data on gender and species of all these tortoises is organized in the table shown below. If a tortoise from this study is to be selected at random, let A = the tortoise is femaleand B = the tortoise is a Morafka. Which of the following appropriately interprets the value of P(B|A)?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: 31.3% is the probability that a randomly selected female tortoise is a Morafka tortoise.

choice_map.A: 31.3% is the probability that a randomly selected Morafka tortoise is a female tortoise.
choice_map.B: 31.3% is the probability that a randomly selected female tortoise is a Morafka tortoise.
choice_map.C: 19.2% is the probability that a randomly selected Morafka tortoise is a female tortoise.
choice_map.D: 19.2% is the probability that a randomly selected female tortoise is a Morafka tortoise.
choice_map.E: 31.3% is the probability that a randomly selected tortoise is a Morafka tortoise.

extraction_notes: answer field is a numeric index "1", but the indexing scheme is not explicit, so the answer was not mapped to an option text
image field contains a PIL image object representation rather than a file path or URL
source_intake_record.subject: Math

image_dependency: 题干显式提到“the table shown below”，且 `requires_image=true`。
`text_dominant=false`，说明关键信息不主要由纯文本承载。
资产登记显示存在 1 张表格图片，`registry_passed=true`，图像资源是题目组成部分。
但题目核心是在解释条件概率记号 `P(B|A)`，存在一定纯概念求解空间，因此不打满分。
multi_step: 再将 `P(B|A)` 解释为“在 A 已发生条件下 B 的概率”，属于至少两步符号到自然语言映射。
题目是五选一解释题，没有明显复杂计算或长链推理，因此多步性中等偏低。
答案文本直接给出标准解释，说明推理链较短、结果形式较固定。
verifiability: 这是单选题场景，候选项明确，标准答案可唯一对齐到选项 B。
`answer_type` 为文本且答案内容具体清晰，可直接规则核验。
`answer_present=true` 且 `registry_passed=true`，上游登记完整，便于后续验证。
条件概率语义有稳定的数学定义，解释是否正确较容易检查。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产均存在，且 `registry_passed=true`、`issues` 为空，核心语义支撑完整。
可验证性高（`verifiability_score=0.91`），属于标准单选解释题，答案可较稳定核验。
题目明确引用表格图像，图像资源已登记存在，样本形态完整，具备进入候选池的基础条件。
虽然存在“图像可读性一般”和“概念题可能降低真实图像依赖”等风险，但这些更影响排序优先级，不构成缺少核心语义。
